query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS business_plans (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  entityType ENUM('llc', 'corporation', 'trust', 'nonprofit_508', 'nonprofit_501c3', 'collective', 'sole_proprietorship') NOT NULL,
  entityName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  houseId INT,
  createdByUserId INT NOT NULL,
  missionStatement TEXT,
  visionStatement TEXT,
  organizationDescription TEXT,
  yearFounded INT,
  productsServices TEXT,
  uniqueValueProposition TEXT,
  targetMarket TEXT,
  marketSize VARCHAR(255),
  competitiveAdvantage TEXT,
  teamSize INT,
  teamDescription TEXT,
  keyPersonnel JSON,
  startupCosts DECIMAL(14, 2),
  monthlyOperatingCosts DECIMAL(14, 2),
  projectedRevenueYear1 DECIMAL(14, 2),
  projectedRevenueYear2 DECIMAL(14, 2),
  projectedRevenueYear3 DECIMAL(14, 2),
  breakEvenTimeline VARCHAR(100),
  fundingNeeded DECIMAL(14, 2),
  fundingPurpose TEXT,
  fundingSources JSON,
  shortTermGoals JSON,
  longTermGoals JSON,
  milestones JSON,
  socialImpact TEXT,
  communityBenefit TEXT,
  status ENUM('draft', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'approved', 'archived') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP,
  approvedAt TIMESTAMP,
  approvedBy INT,
  version INT DEFAULT 1,
  previousVersionId INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:

  startupCosts DECIMAL(14, 2),

  projectedRevenueYear1 DECIMAL(14, 2),
  projectedRevenueYear2 DECIMAL(14, 2),
  projectedRevenueYear3 DECIMAL(14, 2),
  breakEvenTimeline VARCHAR(100),
  fundingNeeded DECIMAL(14, 2),
  fundingPurpose TEXT,

  shortTermGoals JSON,
  longTermGoals JSON,
  milestones JSON,
  socialImpact TEXT,
  communityBenefit TEXT,
  status ENUM('draft', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'approved', 'archived') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP,
